---
description: "Introduction scaffold for tutorial-type articles"
---

# Pattern: Tutorial introduction

> Scaffold for tutorials (learning-oriented articles). Copy, adapt, and delete the placeholder comments.

```markdown
# Article Title

> Brief value proposition — what you'll achieve

## Table of Contents
[...]

## Introduction

Learn how to [main goal]. By the end of this tutorial, you'll have [specific outcome].

**What you'll build:** [Description of the end product]

**Time required:** [Estimated time]

**Prerequisites:**
- Knowledge: [Required understanding]
- Tools: [Required software/access]
- Setup: [Required configuration]
```

---

**Source:** Diátaxis — tutorials are learning-oriented. See `article-writing.instructions.md` for voice and formatting rules.
